case_title: MACCHELLO & ASSOCIATES VS LAW OFFICES OF ABRAHAM A, FLORES, JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACCHELLO & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF ABRAHAM A, FLORES, JR. $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLT GRANTED BY COMM. WITH AN AMENDED JUDGMENT.
PLTFF/CREDITOR FILING FOR MOTION FOR CONSIDERATION PAID $14.00 CHECK. COPY MAILED TO OTHER PARTY, PA- PERS GIVEN TO NORA.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF ABRAHAM A, FLORES, JR.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT. IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT AMENDED NUNC PRO TUNC TO REFLECT PRINCIPAL OF $101.18 AND COSTS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $101.18 FILED BY MACCHELLO & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF ABRAHAM A, FLORES, JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACCHELLO & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF ABRAHAM A, FLORES, JR. $101.18 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $151.18, JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC TO JUNE 29, 1998. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
